title: 2025-08-28 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 8.10
description: New daily signal for 2025-08-28: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 8.10/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and volatility shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-08-28, the score printed 8.10/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and volatility doing most of the work.
